_description: Progressive Web App manifest for YWI Ontario OHSA workplace safety and mobile field operations. Defines app name, icons, theme colors, display mode, and start URL for installable app behavior.
name: YWI Ontario Workplace Safety System
description: Ontario workplace safety and mobile field operations web app for toolbox talks, PPE checks, first aid checks, inspections, drills, logbook review, jobs, equipment, and admin management.
